mapper.select: SELECT oi.dish_id AS dishId, oi.dish_name AS dishName, SUM(oi.quantity) AS totalQuantity, SUM(oi.unit_price * oi.quantity) AS totalAmount FROM order_item oi JOIN order_info o ON oi.order_no = o.order_no WHERE o.merchant_id = #{merchantId} AND o.status = '已完成' AND o.create_time BETWEEN #{start} AND #{end} GROUP BY oi.dish_id, oi.dish_name ORDER BY totalQuantity DESC
